linkSkill.name: Moonlit Blade Learnings
linkSkill.shortDesc: If Critical Rate: 100%+ and Critical Damage: 50%, Critical Damage: +7%

info: Hayato is only available for creation in Japan, China, Global, SEA, and Taiwan versions of MapleStory

build: <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/battoujutsu-leap.png} tip={Battoujutsu Leap}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/aoryu.png} tip={Aoryu}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shouryuusen.png} tip={Shouryuusen}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-mist-slash.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Mist Slash}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-grazing-cut.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Grazing Cut}>

<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/vapor-blade.png} tip={Vapor Blade}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/mushin.png} tip={Mushin}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/akatsuki-samurai.png} tip={Unfaltering Blade}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/polished-form.png} tip={Polished Form}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/mist-slash-mastery.png} tip={Jin [Shinsoku] Mist Slash}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/identify-weakness.png} tip={Identify Weakness}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/indomitable-vanguard.png} tip={Indomitable Vanguard}>

<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/warriors-heart.png} tip={Warrior's Heart}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-stormcloud-splitter.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Stormcloud Splitter}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/hitokiri-hundred-strike-legacy.png} tip={Hitokiri Hundred Strike Legacy}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/mist-slash-mastery-ii.png} tip={Fuu [Shinsoku] Mist Slash}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-crescent-moon-cut.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Crescent Moon Cut}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/battou-dark-moon-cut-1.png} tip={[Battou] Dark Moon Cut}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/endless-rain.png} tip={Endless Rain}>

<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/bloodletter.png} tip={Bloodletter}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/eye-for-an-eye.png} tip={Eye for an Eye}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/mist-slash-mastery-iii.png} tip={Mist Slash Mastery III}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/akatsuki-warrior.png} tip={Akatsuki Warrior}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/bushidos-will.png} tip={Bushido's Will}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/cleaver.png} tip={Cleaver}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/deflection.png} tip={Deflection}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/noble-sword.png} tip={Hitokiri Strike}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku.png} tip={Shinsoku}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/sudden-strike.png} tip={Sudden Strike}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/tornado-blade.png} tip={Tornado Blade}> -> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/akatsuki-will.png} tip={Hero's Will}>
details: All 1st to 4th Job skills can be maxed
Put one SP into each skill first and then max each skill in this order
For any skills that have prerequisites, follow them first before following build path

hyperBuild.recommended: <bp_<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-reinforce.png} tip={Shinsoku - Reinforce}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-extra-strike.png} tip={Shinsoku - Extra Strike}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-boss-rush.png} tip={Shinsoku - Boss Rush}> Shinsoku - Reinforce, Extra Strike and Boss Rush_<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/hitokiri-strike-persist.png} tip={Hitokiri Strike - Persist}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/hitokiri-strike-cooldown-cutter.png} tip={Hitokiri Strike - Cooldown Cutter}> Hitokiri Strike- Persist and Cooldown Cutter_>

nodes: <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku.png} tip={Shinsoku / Akatsuki Trace (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/falcons-honor.png} tip={Falcon's Honor (Hyper Skill)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/mist-slash-mastery-iii.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Mist Slash / Blade Flash (4th Job)}>

<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/hitokiri-hundred-strike.png} tip={Hitokiri Hundred Strike / Summer Rain (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/sudden-strike.png} tip={Sudden Strike (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/noble-sword.png} tip={Hitokiri Strike (4th Job)}>
notes: Any combination of these skills are good but preferred from same category as you want to max primary first
The last skill from the Secondary Trio can be any skill of your preference
4 Boost Nodes total are needed to reach Master Level 60 for these skills (with Matrix Points used)<bp_Nodes with the same Main Skill (skill at the top) cannot be equipped at the same time_>

possible.nodes: <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-mist-slash-iv.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Mist Slash (1st Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-grazing-cut.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Grazing Cut / [Shinsoku] Stormcloud Splitter (1st Job / 3rd Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/reactive-focus.png} tip={Reactive Focus (3rd Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/battou-dark-moon-cut-1.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Crescent Moon Cut / [Battou] Dark Moon Cut (3rd Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-afterimage-slash.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Afterimage Slash (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/battou-full-moons-rage-1.png} tip={[Battou] Full Moon's Rage (4th Job)}> <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/shinsoku-silent-arc.png} tip={[Shinsoku] Silent Arc (Hyper Skill)}>

credits: Inner Ability + Hyper Passive Build + Boost Nodes

primary.name: Natural Talent
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increases Speed by 20, Max Speed by 25, Jump by 10, Katana Mastery by 80%, and Willpower by 30.

primary.name: Return of the Five Planets
primary.shortDesc: Return to Momijigaoka\nCooldown 600 sec

primary.name: Hero's Echo
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, increases Attack Power & Magic ATT by 4% for 2400 sec\nCooldown: 300 sec
details: To obtain this skill, complete the quest <link href={https://maplestorywiki.net/w/Quests/57/A_God_Among_Horses} title={"A God Among Horses"}>

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Mist Slash
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10\nMax Enemies Hit: 4, Damage: 30%, Number of Attacks: 6

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Grazing Cut
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 15
Move quickly in the direction pressed, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Damage: 40%, Number of Attacks: 5
Can be used 1 time per 1 sec., up to 5 times.
Can be used consecutively up to 5 times in the air.
details: Pressing an Arrow Key and Skill Key together will dash in the given direction

primary.name: Battoujutsu Dash
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10\nAllows you to jump a greater distance.
details: Can be assigned a Key Slot or activated by pressing jump twice<bp_While in the air, pressing together with the Up Arrow Key will perform a vertical jump_>

primary.name: Aoryu
primary.shortDesc: When attacking normal enemies with Shinsoku skills, Final Damage: +100%

primary.name: Mist Slash Mastery
primary.shortDesc: Shinsoku Mist Slash MP Cost: 15\nMax Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 55%, Number of Attacks: 6
details: Increases Max Enemies Hit and %Damage of attack

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Countercurrent Slash
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20\nMax Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 140%, Number of Attacks: 6\nCooldown: 7 sec

primary.name: [Battou] Crossing Draw
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30\nMax Enemies Hit: 7, Damage: 180%, Number of Attacks: 6, Chase Cuts: 2\nCooldown: 20 sec.

primary.name: Mushin
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20\nDuration: 200 sec., Attack Speed: +2

primary.name: Akatsuki Samurai
primary.shortDesc: Akatsuki: Final Damage: +50%, Ignore Defense: +20%
primary.desc: Upon using a Battou Skill, enter [Akatsuki] state that grants a %Final Damage and %Ignore DEF buff
details: Duration of buff increases (up to 60s) upon using a Battou Skill
Right-clicking the skill will toggle the UI visual effect ON/OFF

primary.name: Indomitable Vanguard
primary.shortDesc: Knockback Resistance: +100%, Damage: +20%, STR: +30, DEX: +30

primary.name: Identify Weakness
primary.shortDesc: Critical Rate: +40%, Critical Damage: +30%

primary.name: Polished Form
primary.shortDesc: Max HP: +20%, Max MP: +20%, Speed: +20, Jump: +10, Attack Power: +15

primary.name: Mist Slash Mastery II
primary.shortDesc: Shinsoku Mist Slash MP Cost: 20\nMax Enemies Hit: 7, Damage: 90%, Number of Attacks: 6
details: Increases Max Enemies Hit and %Damage of attack

primary.name: Reactive Focus
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 50\nShuchu Duration: 0.6 sec, Upon getting hit in Shuchu state, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 130%, Number of Attacks: 8, Invincibility Duration: 2 sec.\nCooldown: 30 sec.
primary.desc: Upon use, briefly enter [Shuchu] state where if you are hit, the attack is nullified and you become invincible and release a counterattack

primary.name: [Battou] Dark Moon Cut
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 40\nMax Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 240%, Number of Attacks: 8, Chase Cuts: 5\nCooldown: 20 sec.

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Crescent Moon Cut
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30\nMax Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 310%, Number of Attacks: 8\nCooldown: 12 sec
primary.desc: Dash and slash in the direction of the Arrow Key pressed
details: If no Arrow Key is pressed, slash in place

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Stormcloud Splitter
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 19\nMax Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 108%, Number of Attacks: 6\nCooldown: 3 sec

primary.name: Hitokiri Hundred Strike Legacy
primary.shortDesc: Damage: +20%

primary.name: Endless Rain
primary.shortDesc: Final Damage: +15%

primary.name: Warrior's Heart
primary.shortDesc: Upon triggering a critical hit, Recovery Chance: 40%, Recovery: 4% of Max HP
primary.desc: Critical hits have a chance to recover %Max HP

primary.name: Mist Slash Mastery III
primary.shortDesc: Shinsoku Mist Slash MP Cost: 25\nMax Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 150%, Number of Attacks: 6
details: Increases Max Enemies Hit and %Damage of attack

primary.name: Noto
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80\nNoto Duration: 3 sec. When using a Battou skill while in Noto, cancel Noto, Battou Skill Final Damage: +200%\nCooldown: 60 sec.
primary.desc: Upon use, briefly enter [Noto] state where the next Battou skill used gains increased %Final Damage and consumes the buff
details: Can be used while casting another skill to cancel the casting delay of the previous skill

primary.name: [Shinsoku] Afterimage Slash
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 80
Charge Attack - Max Enemies Hit: 12, Damage: 370%, Number of Attacks: 8
Slash Attack - Max Enemies Hit: 10, Damage: 470%, Number of Attacks: 10
Cooldown: 12 sec.
primary.desc: Dash and slash in the direction of the Arrow Key pressed while leaving behind an [Afterimage]
details: While the [Afterimage] is active and within range, pressing the Skill Key again will teleport back to its location and slash nearby enemies
If no Arrow Key is pressed, slash in place

primary.name: Akatsuki Will
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Removes all abnormal status effects\nCooldown: 300 sec
primary.desc: Removes certain abnormal status effects and become immune to Abnormal Status for a few seconds

primary.name: Akatsuki Warrior
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 70, creates a Sengoku Warrior emblem\n[Passive Effect: All stats with a direct AP investment increase by 15%]
details: Skill is a passive, the active effect does nothing except displays an animation

primary.name: [Battou] Full Moon's Rage
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 70\nMax Enemies Hit: 12, Damage: 370%, Number of Attacks: 10, Chase Cuts: 8\nCooldown: 60 sec.

primary.name: Noble Sword
primary.shortDesc: Attack Speed: +1, Attack Power & Magic ATT: +5%, Max HP & MP: +25%

primary.name: Steel Resolve
primary.shortDesc: Abnormal Status Resistance: +50, Elemental Resistance: +50%

primary.name: Cleaver
primary.shortDesc: Ignore Defense: +35%, Damage: +30%

primary.name: Deflection
primary.shortDesc: 20% chance to activate upon getting hit.\nDuration: 3 sec. Damage Reduction (including attacks that deal a fixed percentage of damage): 50%, Effect Cooldown: 15 sec.
primary.desc: Upon taking damage, there is a chance to gain a buff that reduces damage taken including %Max HP attacks

hyperPassive.name: Shinsoku - Boss Rush
details: Increases %Boss Damage of all Shinsoku skills

hyperPassive.name: Shinsoku - Spread
details: Increases Max Enemies Hit of all Shinsoku skills

hyperPassive.name: Shinsoku - Guardbreak
details: Increases %Ignore DEF of all Shinsoku skills

hyperPassive.name: Battou - Boss Rush
details: Increases %Boss Damage of all Battou skills

hyperPassive.name: Battou - Guardbreak
details: Increases %Ignore DEF of all Battou skills

hyperActive.name: Bushido
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 150, Duration: 30 sec., Attack Power: +50, Status Resistance: +50, Elemental Resistance: +50%, Critical Damage: +15%, Boss Damage: +20%\nCooldown: 120 sec.

hyperActive.name: [Shinsoku] Silent Arc
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 100\nMax Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 205%, Number of Attacks: 10, Chase Cuts: 5\nCooldown: 20 sec.
hyperActive.desc: Release a slash that damages enemies in a large area

hyperActive.name: Akatsuki Blessing
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 100, Duration: 60 sec, Damage: 10%\nApplies to any Sengoku Warrior class in the party.\nCooldown: 120 sec

fifthMain.name: Shogetsu Form
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 1000, enter Noto state for 20 sec. Shogetsu Duration: 30 sec., no enemy attack can knock you back while active, Final Damage: +100%, Ignore Defense: +50%, increases attack activations of Battou skills.\nCooldown: 120 sec.
fifthMain.desc: When used, enter <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/noto.png} tip={Noto (4th Job)}> [Noto] state and enhances <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/hayato/akatsuki-samurai.png} tip={Akatsuki Samurai (2nd Job)}> [Akatsuki] state into [Shogetsu] state that increases %Final Damage, %Ignore DEF, prevents all knockbacks (Super Knockback Resistance), and enhances all Battou Skills
details: Enhanced Battou Skills gain increased attack activations (Chase Cuts)

fifthMain.name: [Shinsoku] Crashing Tide
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 600\nMax Enemies Hit: 12, Damage: 740%, Number of Attacks: 9, Chase Cuts: 15\nCooldown: 60 sec.

fifthMain.name: [Shinsoku] Light Cutter
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 400\nMax Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 600%, Number of Attacks: 8, Chase Cuts: 4\nGain 1 use every 15 seconds, can be used up to 3 times in a row.
fifthMain.desc: Dash and slash in the direction of the Arrow Key pressed
details: If no Arrow Key is pressed, slash in place

fifthMain.name: [Battou] Wailing Heavens
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 1000\nMax Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 550%, Number of Attacks: 14, Chase Cuts: 30, invincible for a short period\nCooldown: 120 sec.
fifthMain.desc: Unleash a devastating attack in a large area

fifthBoost.name: Hitokiri Hundred Strike/Summer Rain Boost
fifthBoost.shortDesc: Hitokiri Hundred Strike/Summer Rain Final Damage: +420%

fifthBoost.name: Vapor Blade/Indomitable Vanguard/Identify Weakness Boost
fifthBoost.shortDesc: Vapor Blade/Indomitable Vanguard/Identify Weakness Final Damage: +180%

fifthBoost.name: [Battou] Dark Moon Cut/[Shinsoku] Crescent Moon Cut/Endless Rain Boost

skillCore.name: Shin Quick Draw
skillCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1200, invincible during casting
Activates 15 Chase Cuts that deal 720% damage to up to 15 enemies 15 times, then applies the Shin Quick Draw buff for up to 10 seconds. Grants Noto state and increases Final Damage by 10% while buff is active.
1st/2nd/3rd Strike: Activates 10 Chase Cuts dealing 620% damage to up to 15 enemies 12 times.
Final Strike: Activates 60 Chase Cuts that deal 800% damage to nearby enemies 15 times, invincible during casting.
Cooldown: 360 sec.

skillCore.name: Fleeting Breath
skillCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 1000, Invincible during casting
Releases 10 blades, dealing 5180% damage to up to 15 enemies 12 times
Afterwards, the blade cuts enemies 30 times, dealing 6125% damage 15 times
Ignore Defense: +60%, Boss Damage: +40%, Critical Rate: 100%

boostCore.name: Shogetsu Form Boost
boostCore.shortDesc: Duration increased to 40 sec., Final Damage increased by 110%, Ignore Defense Rate increased by 80%

notable.name: HEXA Mist Slash Mastery III - 6th Job

meta: Hayato is a STR warrior class part of the Sengoku. Hayato also has a secondary resource called Sword Energy which certain skills consume. With Sword Energy, you also gain bonus stats depending on the amount you have. Hayato also has two stances one for mobbing and one for bossing which you can switch between at anytime
